title: hieracium lachenalii subsp. litocretaceum
intro: Hieracium lachenalii subsp. litocretaceum, also known as Crete hawk's-beard, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family, Asteraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hieracium lachenalii subsp. litocretaceum include its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation, making it a popular remedy for various health conditions. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Hieracium lachenalii subsp. litocretaceum are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
